zh.Holkham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可霍爾哈姆
zh.Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登
zh.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUM於1106年出生在英國諾福爾可霍爾哈姆。她於大約1105年與Halenade de Bidun在英國巴金哈姆爾拉文登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1160年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍爾哈姆享年54歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可霍爾哈姆。

zh-hans.Holkham, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可霍爾哈姆
zh-hans.Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾拉文登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUM于1106年出生在英国諾福爾可霍爾哈姆。她于大约1105年与Halenade de Bidun在英国巴金哈姆爾拉文登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1160年在英国英格兰諾福爾可霍爾哈姆享年54岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可霍爾哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

variants.name: Sarah
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUM was born in 1106, in Holkham, Norfolk, England. She married Halenade de Bidun about 1105, in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1160, in Holkham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Holkham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUM est née en 1106, à Holkham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Halenade de Bidun environ 1105, à Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1160, à Holkham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Holkham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUM wurde 1106 in Holkham, Norfolk, England geboren. Sie hat um 1105 in Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England Halenade de Bidun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1160 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Holkham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Holkham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUM è nata il nel 1106 nel Holkham, Norfolk, England. Lei sposato Halenade de Bidun circa 1105, nel Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1160, nel Holkham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Holkham, Norfolk, England.

ja.Holkham, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクホールクハム
ja.Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, England: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアラベンドン
ja.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUMは1106年にイギリスノーフォルクホールクハムで生まれた。約1105年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラベンドンでHalenade de Bidunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1160年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホールクハムで54歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクホールクハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUM(은)는 1106년 영국 노르폴크 홀카에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1105년 영국 벅잉함실르 레이븐던에서 Halenade de Bidun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1160년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 홀카에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 홀카에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUM nasceu em 1106, em Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Halenade de Bidun aproximadamente 1105, em Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1160, em Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUM родилась в 1106 г. в местности холхам, норфолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Halenade de Bidun около 1105 г. в местности лавендон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1160 г. в местности холхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности холхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sara DE BIDUM nació en 1106, en Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con Halenade de Bidun aproximadamente 1105, en Lavendon, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1160, en Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Holkham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
